title: mirabilis latifolia
intro: Mirabilis latifolia, also known as the Mexican primrose willow or broad-leaved miracle flower, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mirabilis latifolia include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
